caption: The video shows a man wearing a light gray shirt with "IOM" and a globe logo on the back, along with a white cap. He is seen walking away from an ambulance, which has a blue medical symbol on its side. The setting appears to be an outdoor area with a sandy or gravelly ground, possibly near a rural or semi-rural location. As he walks, the camera follows him from behind, capturing his movement across the open space. The subtitle at the bottom of the screen reads, "and sometimes it can be as many as 27 cases," suggesting that the video might be discussing a situation involving multiple cases, potentially related to medical or humanitarian aid. The man's posture and the context imply that he may be involved in coordinating or managing these cases.
